name: Off Course
short_description: Stuck in a time loop, stop the possessed captain's plans in this cooperate-with-yourself puzzle game. Record each pirate’s actions to solve puzzles, interact with adorable animal companions and get to know the brave pirate crew and the bond they share with each other!
detailed_description:
In this single player puzzle cooperation game, you need to use the time loop you are stuck in to your advantage. Control three pirates in this 3D game and find a way to the helm of a ship through various puzzle rooms in order to save it from its downfall and break the endless cycle.

Cooperate with yourself

Instead of relying on your friends to understand your masterplan, only you need to understand your masterplan! Whenever you select a pirate your actions are recorded and replayed when you play another pirate. Use this interaction with your past selves to fight your way to deck!

Get to know the crew

While they are a strong team, Heavy, Häkchen and Holzi all have different life paths and reasons why they ended up on this pirate ship. Personal items in their cabins and personalized dialogue will give you more information about each pirate.

What's a pirate crew without animal companions?

Meet witty animal companions on ship: Häkchen's dearly-beloved pig Luna who is ready to follow Häkchen wherever he goes, Phil the Narwhal who seems to know more than he lets on and the pirate captain's parrot Pat. They all will help you on your way to stop the cycle - some more than others.

Feature List

  • A puzzle game set on a pirate ship

  • Record your actions with a pirate

  • Cooperate with the actions of the other pirates that you recorded

  • Three pirate characters with unique abilities

  • Hilarious character dialogue

  • Voiced Characters and Animals

Enjoy stylized visuals, atmospheric soundtracks, fully voiced characters and a not-so-serious world created by students from TUM, HFF and HMTM in Munich.

reviews.review_text: A very boring level-based game with character switching. The only thing it gave me was a smile when I pressed the spacebar and the pirates said “arr” — that was cool, but that’s about it. Also, you can’t skip the cutscene — I pressed the supposed key and even tried all the keys, but nothing worked.
